title: Distribution of beneficial insects with air systems from the ground
subtitle: Απελευθέρωση ωφέλιμων εντόμων με συστήματα αέρα από εδάφους
description: A practice abstract detailing how ground-based air systems can be used to release beneficial insect predators in integrated pest management for greenhouse vegetable crops. It highlights the precision, uniformity, and labor-saving advantages of manual and trailed machinery options available to producers while reducing chemical pesticide usage.
